description: Correct a data entry error in the portfolio file at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/misassigned_trades.xml where speculative tech stocks were recorded in the wrong securities account. Move all NVIDIA (NVDA) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) transactions from the 'Retirement Savings' account to the 'Speculative Tech' account, ensuring that Vanguard Total Bond (BND) transactions remain in the 'Retirement Savings' account. Preserve the original transaction dates and prices during the move and save the updated portfolio file.
